paragraph: South Hackensack's market is defined almost entirely by multi-family properties, where five sales over seven months landed at a median of $755,500. The sale-to-list ratio of 1.04 and median days on market of 18 tell you sellers are pricing reasonably and homes are moving without extended waits. One sale closed above $970,000, but the floor was $625,000, so the range reflects real variation in unit count, condition, and location within town. The sub-10-unit segment, which represents two of those five sales, moved even faster at a median of 10.5 days on market and a ratio of 1.05, suggesting smaller multi-family buildings attract focused buyer attention. You're looking at a market where priced homes are moving and buyers aren't finding much leverage to negotiate down. If you're considering multi-family as an investment or owner-occupant play in Bergen County, South Hackensack deserves a close look, but you'll want to move decisively once you find the right building.
